name: entur-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap a new Entur app: self-service manifests, Helm, Terraform, Docker, and CI/CD wired together with consistent identifiers.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold a new Entur app end to end.
interface.longDescription: Generates self-service manifests, Helm chart, Terraform scaffolding, Dockerfile, and CI/CD workflows for a new Entur application. All identifiers (metadata.id, Helm shortname, Terraform app_id) are kept consistent across files.
